name: Vanisha Gupta
bio: Full-stack developer focused on building scalable web applications and integrating AI-driven solutions.
brief: Third-year B.Tech CSE student (AKTU, CGPA 8.30) specializing in full-stack and frontend development using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and TypeScript. Experienced in AI integration (OpenAI API, LangChain, Make/n8n) and 3D visualization (Three.js). Solved 100+ DSA problems and passionate about building real-world impactful projects.

projects.title: INDIANIME
projects.description: A modular React.js e-commerce SPA with 3D product visualization. Built reusable UI components and implemented client-side routing across multiple pages. Integrated Three.js for 360° interactive previews and designed responsive UI using Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: AutoInquire — AI Inquiry Automation System
projects.description: End-to-end automated inquiry pipeline using Google Forms and OpenAI API. Delivered context-aware responses and reduced response time from hours to under 2 minutes. Implemented agentic workflows with Make (n8n) for automated Gmail replies and Slack notifications.

projects.title: AI Language Tutor
projects.description: Multimodal AI tutoring app built with Streamlit integrating GPT-4o, Whisper, and GPT-3.5. Includes speech-to-text pipeline for evaluating spoken responses and providing instant feedback on grammar, translation, and image-based tasks.

highlights: Managed digital registration workflows across 5+ colleges
Coordinated outreach campaigns and improved event visibility
Supported execution of 4+ technical events with 100+ participants
Managed registrations, scheduling, and result tracking

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
education.institution: Hindustan College of Science and Technology, Mathura

achievements: Completed 25-hour Generative AI workshop (OpenAI APIs, prompt engineering, Make/n8n)
Finalist in Logic Quest 1.0, Byte Master, and Brainometry competitions
